raw_output:
Ahoy there! Catching a wave is like chasing a beautiful mermaid on a stormy sea, matey! First, you gotta find the right spot where the waves are breaking nicely. Once you've found your target, paddle hard towards it.

Remember, timing is everything when you're trying to catch a wave! Wait for that perfect moment - the exact instance when the wave starts to rise and curve - then jump up onto your board, ideally just behind the peak of the wave.

Now comes the fun part: ride the swell! Feel the power of the ocean beneath you as you glide along the face of the wave. Hang ten if you dare, but don't forget to keep an eye on where you're going and prepare for the inevitable wipeout.

Just remember, my friend, the ocean can be a tricky beast at times, so always stay safe and respect its might. Happy wave riding!
